name: Hiring Recommendation Algorithm
description: Enterprise candidate-screening model used for shortlisting with high fairness and oversight sensitivity.

source_reference.citation: This is a deployment-inspired synthetic scenario constructed for MEDF evaluation. The cited source provides governance and risk framing context only and is not evidence of a specific deployed system configuration or measured outcomes.

assumptions: Scores are analyst-assigned Likert estimates for a deployment-like enterprise hiring workflow and not outcomes from one named employer.
The cited source is used for fairness and governance context, not as proof of a single production model configuration.
Scenario assumes human recruiters retain final decision authority while the model is used for shortlisting support.
